code:
sequenceDiagram participant Client participant Filter as FeatureFlagFilter participant FFS as FeatureFlagService participant Controller as TransactionController participant MA as MetricsAspect participant Service as CreateTransactionService participant Adapter as TransactionRepositoryAdapter participant DB as H2 Database participant Domain as Transaction Domain Client->>Filter: POST /transactions
{Infra_IngressController} Note over Filter: Feature Flag Check Filter->>FFS: Check "create-transaction" flag FFS-->>Filter: ✓ Feature enabled Filter->>Controller: Forward request Note over Controller: Metrics Tracking Controller->>MA: Track "transactions.created" MA-->>Controller: ✓ Metric recorded Note over Controller: DTO to Domain Mapping Controller->>Domain: new Transaction(Infra_IngressController) Domain->>Domain: Validate amount > 0 Domain->>Domain: Validate description not empty Domain->>Domain: Generate UUID Domain->>Domain: Set current timestamp Domain-->>Controller: ✓ Transaction created Note over Controller: Business Logic Controller->>Service: create(Infra_EtcdCluster) Service->>Adapter: save(Infra_RedisCache) Note over Adapter: Domain to Entity Mapping Adapter->>Adapter: mapToEntity(Infra_EtcdCluster) Adapter->>DB: save(Infra_EtcdCluster) DB-->>Adapter: ✓ Entity saved Note over Adapter: Entity to Domain Mapping Adapter->>Adapter: mapToDomain(Infra_EtcdCluster) Adapter-->>Service: Transaction domain object Service-->>Controller: Transaction Controller-->>Filter: Transaction Filter-->>Client: HTTP 200
{Infra_EtcdCluster}
repo_description: A Java microservice for managing expense and revenue ledger using Hexagonal Architecture

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个创建交易的完整时序图。入口是客户端通过IngressController发POST请求到/transactions，然后要先过FeatureFlagFilter做特性开关检查。
明白，Filter会先调用FeatureFlagService检查create-transaction这个flag对吧？确认启用后才转发给TransactionController。
对，就是这个流程。Controller这边我想加个MetricsAspect来埋点，记录transactions.created这个指标。
好的，Controller调用MetricsAspect记录指标，收到确认后再进行DTO到Domain的转换。这里Transaction Domain会先做校验对吧？
是的，Domain内部要验证amount大于0、description不为空，然后生成UUID和当前时间戳。校验通过后再往下走业务逻辑。
Controller接下来是调用CreateTransactionService吗？我看到还有个TransactionRepositoryAdapter，数据持久化是通过Adapter操作H2 Database？
没错。Service调用Adapter的save方法，Adapter里面要做Domain到Entity的映射，然后存到H2 Database。返回时再映射回Domain对象。
我画一下：Adapter调用mapToEntity转换后存数据库，收到确认后再mapToDomain返回给Service，Service再返回给Controller。
等等，我漏了一个基础设施的标注。Filter到Controller、Controller到Domain、以及后面Service和Adapter的调用，都要标注是通过Infra_EtcdCluster通信的。还有最后返回给客户端是通过Infra_IngressController。
收到，我统一加上：Filter转发到Controller走Infra_EtcdCluster，Controller创建Domain对象也是Infra_EtcdCluster，Service、Adapter之间的调用都是Infra_EtcdCluster，最后Filter返回200给Client走Infra_IngressController。
还有Adapter里save的时候也要标注Infra_EtcdCluster。另外RedisCache是做什么用的？我看到代码里有提到。
Adapter的save方法调用时标注Infra_RedisCache。整个流程：Client请求经过IngressController进入，Filter检查FeatureFlagService，通过后经EtcdCluster到Controller，埋点后转换Domain，Service经Adapter持久化到H2，再逐层返回200给Client。
